calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEVE RIVERA & JARED RIVERA for Respondent/Plaintiff Rivera Public Relations
MICHAEL A. MAZZOCONE, ESQ. for Appellant/Defendant Oola Restaurant & Bar, with witness Ola Fendert

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both parties have signed the Stipulation to Use Judge Pro Tem. The clerk administers an Oath to both parties and the witness.

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence.

Exh. 1 - Timeline - June 2007
Exh. 2 - Public Relations Proposal - June 27, 2007
Exh. A - Local Kithen and Wine Merchant Trial Brief
Exh. B - Oola Restaurant and Bar Trial Brief

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Evidence is retained.

JPT Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-12-2009 Judgment Entered
